positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for hydrocarbon_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~chemical_compound(mixture)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for hydrocarbon_neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~chemical_compound(mixture)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
